note: CE tab fully working — all blocking bugs resolved this session

completed_tasks.name: Fix viz file extension detection (4-level fallback)
Fix presigned URL SignatureDoesNotMatch (separate boto3 client using S3_PUBLIC_URL)
Fix score_dimensions data path (kpis flat on legResults[0].kpis)
Fix viz toggle buttons not responding to clicks (trackBy on *ngFor)

remaining_tasks.name: Visual QA pass on CE tab layout

decisions.decision: Extension detection: 4-level fallback — explicit MIME map → mimetypes → URL path extraction → BrainSuite type hint (movie→.mp4, image→.jpg)
decisions.rationale: mimetypes.guess_extension('video/mp4') returns None on most platforms; BrainSuite presigned URLs may return application/octet-stream

decisions.decision: Presigned URL client (_ensure_presigned_client) uses S3_PUBLIC_URL endpoint, separate from API client
decisions.rationale: HMAC signature includes hostname; rewriting URL after signing breaks signature (minio:9000 vs localhost:9000)

decisions.decision: BrainSuite score_dimensions: kpis flat on legResults[0].kpis, each kpi.categories[] names its pillar. executiveSummary.categories has no kpis.
decisions.rationale: Discovered from real API response — assumed structure was wrong

decisions.decision: trackBy: trackVizByKey on *ngFor viz toggle buttons
decisions.rationale: Without trackBy, mousedown triggers CD which recreates *ngFor DOM nodes; click fires on detached element, ceVizMode never updates

next_action: Visual QA pass on CE tab, commit changes, then move to Phase 4.
context_notes: CE tab fully functional. Viz toggle buttons work. Videos/images load via MinIO presigned URLs. Score data path correct. Three backend files and one frontend file have uncommitted changes.
